title: Computer Networks
description: Practice year-wise MCQs from 2018 to 2026 with explanations and answer review.

questions.prompt: Which protocol is used to transfer web pages over the internet?
questions.explanation: HTTP is the protocol used for retrieving web pages from servers.

questions.prompt: The IP address is used for:
questions.explanation: IP provides the addressing and routing mechanism for packets on a network.

questions.prompt: Which layer of the OSI model is responsible for end-to-end delivery?
questions.explanation: The transport layer ensures reliable end-to-end delivery between applications.
DNS translates human-readable domain names into IP addresses.

questions.prompt: A switch operates mainly at the:
questions.explanation: Switches forward frames based on MAC addresses at the data link layer.

questions.prompt: Which protocol provides secure remote login?
questions.explanation: SSH provides encrypted remote access to systems.

questions.prompt: The main purpose of a router is to:
options: Connect devices within a single LAN
questions.explanation: Routers forward data between different networks based on routing information.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is a private IP address range?
questions.explanation: 172.16.0.0/12 is a private IP address range.

questions.prompt: TCP is preferred over UDP when:
options: Speed is more important than reliability
Reliability and ordered delivery are required
questions.answer: Reliability and ordered delivery are required
questions.explanation: TCP provides reliable, ordered, connection-oriented communication.
